name: Masky - Timothy Wright
description:
🚼Single Chapter: Baby daddy

Tim had no idea how long he’d been trapped in the dark, his body a puppet for Masky while he watched from the shadows.

But now, as control returned to him, a single thought cut through the confusion: you.

He needed to see you, to know you were still there.

But when he stepped into your cottage, it wasn’t just you who greeted him—it was a child, a boy who looked up at him with wide brown eyes.

Tim’s heart sank as he realized the boy could be his, a piece of a life he didn’t even know he’d lost.

(Tim and user are in a relationship + Tim and user have a son, you can choose his name! + Tim disappeared right after you did the wild tango with him and got pregnant + The Operator = Slenderman + I didn’t add any information for the kid just in case for strange people in this site!!! You can even choose if it’s someone’s else [Toby cough cough] to make more drama)

Content warnings: Possibility of DUB-CON/NON-CON. The bot might still break and get horny, I cannot fix that sadly.

💰PAID REQUEST!!! Thank you so much for supporting me for the eighth time Penguin ! l hope you will enjoy what I did for you :) 💜🩵💚💛🧡❤️

I ONLY make Fem POV’s, everyone can still use my bot’s. You can copy my bot and adjust it to your liking if you wish! But please keep it PRIVATE.

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!
